title: Fragrant Peruvian Onion Stir-fry
description: A floral, crisp crowd-pleaser peruvian dish featuring scotch bonnet, caramelized onions and low-sodium-friendly spices.

ingredients.name: Scotch Bonnet Peppers
ingredients.notes: Finely chopped, seeds removed for less heat

ingredients.name: Low Sodium Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: To balance flavors and reduce sodium intake

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions and scotch bonnet peppers, sauté until soft and slightly caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Toss in minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in low sodium soy sauce, cumin powder, and lemon juice. Cook for a few more seconds to blend flavors.
Gently fold in red onions and continue cooking until they are translucent and tender, about 3-5 minutes.
